---
name: Format support
about: Request support for a new tool or session file format
title: '[format] '
labels: enhancement, connector
assignees: ''
---

## Tool name and version

What tool and version do you want supported?

## File format

JSONL, SQLite, YAML, something else?

## Typical file path

Where does the tool store its sessions? (e.g., `~/.claude/projects/<encoded-path>/<session-id>.jsonl`)

## Links

Link to any public spec, documentation, or reverse-engineering notes about the format.

## What data do you need?

Which fields/events are most important to capture? (messages, tool calls, token usage, etc.)
